new_claims.claim_text: The bombing of the biggest bridge in Iran was a "double tap" strike, with the second strike targeting emergency responders assisting the wounded.
new_claims.notes: Claim of specific strike tactics and targeting of humanitarian aid.

new_claims.claim_text: 8 dead, 95 wounded in the Karaj bridge strike, with civilians caught in the impact during Nature Day.
new_claims.notes: Specific casualty numbers and impact on civilian population reported.
